title: Bold All-in-1 PODS Washing Liquid Laundry Detergent Capsules, 100 Washes (50 x 2), Stain Remover For Clothes, Lavender and Camomile Scent
features: All-in-One Convenience: Bold All in One Pods combine detergent, stain remover, and brightener in a single, convenient pod, simplifying your laundry routine.
High Washing Capacity: This pack includes 100 pods (50 x 2), ensuring a long-lasting supply for your laundry needs.
Powerful Stain Removal: Bold Pods are known for their stain-fighting abilities, tackling tough stains to leave your clothes looking fresh and clean.
Advanced Formula: The innovative formula in these pods provides a thorough and effective clean, even in cold water washes.
Scent Sensation: Enjoy the delightful and long-lasting fragrance that Bold leaves on your garments.
Color Protection: Bold All in One Pods are designed to help preserve the vibrancy of your colored clothes, preventing fading.
Suitable for All Machine Types: These pods work equally well in both front-loading and top-loading washing machines.
description: Product Description Bold All-in-1 PODS Washing Liquid Laundry Detergent Capsules, 100 Washes (50 x 2), Stain Remover For Clothes, Lavender and Camomile Scent Discover the powerful cleaning performance of Bold All-in-1 PODS, now in a refreshing Lavender and Camomile scent. These advanced laundry detergent capsules are designed to tackle tough stains and deliver brilliant cleaning with the added freshness of Lenor. Key Features: Powerful 3-in-1 Action: Bold PODS combine detergent, stain remover, and brightener in a single capsule, ensuring your laundry is impeccably clean and brilliantly fresh with every wash. Multi-Compartment Design: The innovative multi-compartment design keeps the ingredients separate until they reach the wash, ensuring the perfect balance of cleaning power and freshness. Fast Dissolving Film: The film of these pods dissolves completely in contact with water, releasing the powerful cleaning technologies to tackle stains, clean effectively, and leave a fresh scent. Lavender & Camomile Scent: Infused with the calming aroma of Lavender and Camomile, these pods not only clean but also leave your laundry smelling delightful without being overpowering. Benefits: Stain Removal and Brightening: Bold PODS are designed to lift stains and brighten fabrics, providing consistent and outstanding results without the mess. Phosphate and Bleach Free: Safe for your clothes and the environment, these pods are phosphate and bleach-free, making them a great choice for professional use. Easy to Use: No measuring, no mess – just toss a pod into the drum and let the powerful formula do the work. Enjoy hassle-free laundry with consistent results every time. Elevate your laundry routine with Bold All-in-1 PODS Lavender & Camomile – where powerful cleaning meets irresistible freshness. Ingredients 30% Anionic Surfactants, 5-15% Soap, <5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Phosphonates, Enzymes, Optical Brighteners, Perfumes, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Benzyl Salicylate, Coumarin, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool Manufacturer Contact Information 0800 716 854 See more
